race.comment: PRESSURISED (10) stepped right out to 2100m last start and got the job done in good fashion. Back to 1800m here but that won't be an issue as he looks a nice horse on the way up. CJP hops in the saddle now and while this is much tougher, he rates well and can work through the grades. SOUTHERN FIRETAIL (12) sat a touch closer last time out at this track and trip but couldn't reel in the progressive winner who has since scored again. The wide draw is a niggle, though Pike sticking is a positive sign and he looks right on the cusp of another win. WAR MATTERS (5) was solid from the back behind a good winner here last start following a good win at Mt Barker two back. May need some luck from the draw but he can be in the finish on recent efforts. LIEN HYPHEN (6) was very impressive winning a CL3 at this track and trip last start and can feature once again. FOREVER DREAMING (2) is better than we saw last time out and can bounce back to form out in trip now.
